zh.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Crawford於1190年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度時，他的父親Reginald de Crawford25歲，母親Margaret Loudoun21歲。他於1220年之前與Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1255年9月21日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度。

zh-hans.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: 苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Crawford于1190年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度时，他的父亲Reginald de Crawford25岁，母亲Margaret Loudoun21岁。他于1220年之前与Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1255年9月21日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Crawford was born in 1190, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Reginald de Crawford, was 25 and his mother, Margaret Loudoun, was 21. He married Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen before 1220, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 21 September 1255, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Crawford est né en 1190, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Reginald de Crawford, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Loudoun, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen avant 1220, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 21 septembre 1255, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Crawford 1190 in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald de Crawford 25 und seine Mutter Margaret Loudoun 21. Er hat vor 1220 in Ayrshire, Scotland Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. September 1255 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Crawford è nato il nel 1190 nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Reginald de Crawford, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Loudoun, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen prima del 1220, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 settembre 1255, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウン
ja.Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: スコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリー
ja.Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Crawfordが1190年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで生まれた時，父Reginald de Crawfordは25歳，母Margaret Loudounは21歳であった。1220年以前にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでLady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1255年9月21日に故郷で65歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Crawford(이)가 1190년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald de Crawford(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Loudoun(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1220년 이전 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1255년 9월 21일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Crawford nasceu em 1190, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Reginald de Crawford, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Loudoun, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen antes 1220, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1255, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Crawford родился в 1190 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Reginald de Crawford было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Loudoun, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen перед 1220 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 21 сентября 1255 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Crawford nació en 1190, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Reginald de Crawford, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Loudoun, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Alice de Draffen Heiress of Draffen antes de 1220, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de septiembre de 1255, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.
